creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
This is a combined patch which updates:

	libgsf
	py-libgsf
	goffice
	gnumeric
	openbabel
	gchemutils

	libgsf-gnome is not supported anymore. We might to recopy the old libgsf to support the old goffice (only they depends on libgsf_gnome). I'm not familiar with these...

	openbabel.3 -> .4, other ports that depend on it must bump version.

Fix: 

The patch is at https://gist.github.com/1849866
